info.title: ABB Robot Web Services API
info.description: RESTful API for interacting with ABB robot controllers. Provides access to controller configuration, I/O systems, RAPID programs, file management, event logging, mastership control, panel operations, subscriptions, system information, and user management.

get.summary: Get warm restart count since last I-start

post.summary: Search networks by name and/or state
Search devices by name, state, or network

200.description: Device details including state, address, I/O data

post.summary: Add runtime device from network scan

200.description: Signal details including logical/physical values, states, quality

get.summary: Get directory listing or file content

post.summary: Copy a file or directory (max 2GB for files)
Save raw event log to file

get.summary: Get events from a log domain

post.summary: Clear events in a specific domain

get.summary: Get specific event by domain and sequence number
List all types in a configuration domain
List supported attributes for a domain type
List all instances of a configuration type
Get attributes for a specific instance

post.summary: Update attribute values for a configuration instance
Remove unprotected instances of a type
Remove all external instances in a domain
Request mastership on a specific domain
Release mastership on a specific domain

get.summary: Get system energy metrics in Joules
Check if current user has a specific grant
Get login information of current user

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication with UAS credentials
